name: Salsa Chicken W/Brussels Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken in a microwave for 10 minutes with garlic powder and lemon pepper.
2. Place the cooked chicken on top of the tomatoes with green chilis in a crockpot.
3. Add the brussels sprouts, jalapeno slices, and cayenne pepper slices to the crockpot.
4. Cook on LOW heat for 7 hours.
5. Serve with rice or alone. (Approximately 202 calories per serving, 3.9g fat, 15.6% of total fat.)
